name: octora
description:
Octora

Private execution layer for Meteora LP actions on Solana

scripts.validator: pkill -f solana-test-validator >/dev/null 2>&1 ; sleep 1 ; npm run validator:reset && solana-test-validator --reset --quiet --ledger .anchor/test-ledger --bind-address 127.0.0.1 --rpc-port 8899 --bpf-program Ao58tvHj3FTwFMiGts5HAc5mastNE61Puiw4ER3rA3NJ target/deploy/octora_mixer.so --bpf-program 86zj6EvHxMywP4Bw4EyZ2VcAjLm1pfGsc6ZjsZbrWwwc target/deploy/octora_executor.so --bpf-program LBUZKhRxPF3XUpBCjp4YzTKgLccjZhTSDM9YuVaPwxo tests/fixtures/meteora_dlmm.so --url https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com --clone D1ZN9Wj1fRSUQfCjhvnu1hqDMT7hzjzBBpi12nVniYD6 --clone BYQtcDyv2BoFuf5ghsYDGPA8iX5F4WquK7zCzUsDwJ63
scripts.deploy:mixer:devnet: solana program deploy --url devnet --program-id target/deploy/octora_mixer-keypair.json target/deploy/octora_mixer.so
scripts.deploy:devnet: npm run deploy:mixer:devnet && npm run deploy:executor:devnet
